text: When scuppers are plugged and an oil spill occurs on deck during fuel transfer, you should:

options.text: Use absorbent material such as sawdust or pads to clean up the spill
Remove the plug from scuppers to allow it to run overboard
Remove scuppers and wash the fuel overboard with chemical solvents
Sound the general emergency alarm immediately

explanation: Absorbent materials are the primary defense for containing a minor spill on deck. By preventing the oil from entering the scuppers, you stop the pollutant from entering the marine environment, which is the immediate priority.
